case_title: MINER, KATHLEEN VS FLASH TAX INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MINER, KATHLEEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FLASH TAX INC. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO TRANSFER TO MUNI COURT DENIED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
